series_metadata.series_description: Draft versions of written materials produced by all departments within the Treasurer of State. Drafts may include: RFPs, RFQs, RFIs, written agreements, spreadsheets, memorandum and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: next draft version is created. Once final version is distributed, all draft versions. ; Paper: next draft version is created. Once final version is distributed, all draft versions
